_comment: Maps RL-graduated skills (skill_rl/skills/<name>) to their published tier in odoo-skills/skills/<tier>/<target_name>. Skills NOT listed here are NOT synced — hand-authored skills like read/odoo-model-inspect and demo/odoo-model-customize-demo stay untouched. To promote a new RL skill, add an entry below and run tools/sync-from-rl.py --apply.

odoo-model-customize.notes: First skill graduated from SkillRL. Lives in write tier because it mutates production records.
